title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 227.397 - Jeff McBride Memorial Highway designated for portion of Interstate 55 in Jefferson County
text:
227.397.  Jeff McBride Memorial Highway designated for portion of Interstate 55 in Jefferson County. — The portion of Interstate 55 in Jefferson County from the intersection of Highway M to a point one mile south shall be designated the "Jeff McBride Memorial Highway".  The department of transportation shall erect and maintain appropriate signs designating such highway, with the costs to be paid for by private donations.
(L. 2008 S.B. 930 & 947)
